texts.label: text
texts.orig: Lateral Entry Admission in Diploma Level Technical Institutes under the Dept. of Higher Education for of ITI Pass-outs
texts.text: Lateral Entry Admission in Diploma Level Technical Institutes under the Dept. of Higher Education for of ITI Pass-outs

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Academic Year 2021-2022
texts.text: Academic Year 2021-2022

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Central Selection Committee-2021 Education (Higher) Department Govt. of Tripura
texts.text: Central Selection Committee-2021 Education (Higher) Department Govt. of Tripura

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Lateral Entry Admission for ITI Pass-outs in Diploma Engineering Programmes for Academic Session 2021-22 Under the Dept. of Higher Education, Govt. of Tripura.
texts.text: Lateral Entry Admission for ITI Pass-outs in Diploma Engineering Programmes for Academic Session 2021-22 Under the Dept. of Higher Education, Govt. of Tripura.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Opening Date: 27.08.2021
texts.text: Opening Date: 27.08.2021

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Closing Date: 10.09.2021
texts.text: Closing Date: 10.09.2021

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The  ITI  Pass  -  out  students  from  NCVT  approved  Institutions  will  get  the  opportunity  for admission  in  the  3 rd Semester  of    Diploma  Engineering  Programmes  for  the  very  first  time  in various Government Polytechnics of Tripura in the academic session 2021- 22. The admission process  will  be  done  through  online  mode  only.  The  candidates  have  to  apply  in  the  specific website  for  Lateral  Entry  Admission  in  Diploma  Level  Institutes  under  the  Dept.  of  Higher Education, Govt. of Tripura. There is no printed application form available for the purpose.
texts.text: The  ITI  Pass  -  out  students  from  NCVT  approved  Institutions  will  get  the  opportunity  for admission  in  the  3 rd Semester  of    Diploma  Engineering  Programmes  for  the  very  first  time  in various Government Polytechnics of Tripura in the academic session 2021- 22. The admission process  will  be  done  through  online  mode  only.  The  candidates  have  to  apply  in  the  specific website  for  Lateral  Entry  Admission  in  Diploma  Level  Institutes  under  the  Dept.  of  Higher Education, Govt. of Tripura. There is no printed application form available for the purpose.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Guidelines for admission in Diploma Engineering through Lateral Entry Scheme from ITI
texts.text: Guidelines for admission in Diploma Engineering through Lateral Entry Scheme from ITI

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: A. Candidates should be resident of Tripura and should have valid PRTC.
texts.text: Candidates should be resident of Tripura and should have valid PRTC.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: B. Candidate with  Madhyamik or 10 th standard passed with 2  years NCVT approved ITI courses (as per Table -1) will be eligible for taking admission into 2 nd year (3 rd semester) of Diploma Engineering through Lateral Entry Scheme
texts.text: Candidate with  Madhyamik or 10 th standard passed with 2  years NCVT approved ITI courses (as per Table -1) will be eligible for taking admission into 2 nd year (3 rd semester) of Diploma Engineering through Lateral Entry Scheme

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: C. Intake capacity shall be the unfilled vacancies in the first year plus 10% of the 'Approved Intake' which shall be over and above i.e. supernumerary to the 'Approved Intake'.
texts.text: Intake capacity shall be the unfilled vacancies in the first year plus 10% of the 'Approved Intake' which shall be over and above i.e. supernumerary to the 'Approved Intake'.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: D. There is no upper age limit for candidates for admission into Diploma Engineering.
texts.text: There is no upper age limit for candidates for admission into Diploma Engineering.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: E. As per AICTE, candidates should have secured 35% marks in aggregate in Madhyamik or 10 th standard or equivalent examination from TBSE/CBSE or any other TBSE recognized boards.
texts.text: As per AICTE, candidates should have secured 35% marks in aggregate in Madhyamik or 10 th standard or equivalent examination from TBSE/CBSE or any other TBSE recognized boards.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: F. Candidate shall produce all original documents including character certificate issued by Head of  the  Institute  last  attended  or  any  Gazetted  Officer.  Such  character  certificates must be issued within six month before the date of document verification and admission.
texts.text: Candidate shall produce all original documents including character certificate issued by Head of  the  Institute  last  attended  or  any  Gazetted  Officer.  Such  character  certificates must be issued within six month before the date of document verification and admission.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: G. Reservation of unfilled vacancies shall be as per the Roster of seats of the preceding Diploma Admission and for additional 10% supernumerary seats new roster will be prepared as per the guidelines of state government.
texts.text: Reservation of unfilled vacancies shall be as per the Roster of seats of the preceding Diploma Admission and for additional 10% supernumerary seats new roster will be prepared as per the guidelines of state government.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: H. Mapping of  ITI  trades  with  corresponding  Diploma  Engineering  Programmes  shall  be  as  in Table -1 below:
texts.text: Mapping of  ITI  trades  with  corresponding  Diploma  Engineering  Programmes  shall  be  as  in Table -1 below:

texts.label: page_footer
texts.orig: Page 2 of 18
texts.text: Page 2 of 18

texts.label: caption
texts.orig: TABLE: 1
texts.text: TABLE: 1

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: I. Registration  and  application  should  be  done  through  online  portal  of  DEEET  maintained  by CSC.
texts.text: Registration  and  application  should  be  done  through  online  portal  of  DEEET  maintained  by CSC.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: J. Application  fee  of Rs.  350 /-  (for  all  candidate  other  than  BPL)  and Rs.  200 /-  (for  BPL candidates) must be paid by the candidates through online mode.
texts.text: Application  fee  of Rs.  350 /-  (for  all  candidate  other  than  BPL)  and Rs.  200 /-  (for  BPL candidates) must be paid by the candidates through online mode.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: K. Beyond  the  examination  fee,  the  payment  gateway  service  charges  also  would  be  borne  by candidate themselves.
texts.text: Beyond  the  examination  fee,  the  payment  gateway  service  charges  also  would  be  borne  by candidate themselves.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: L. Merit list  will  be  prepared  on  the  basis  of  total  marks  obtained  in  ITI  final  examinations  as reflected in Consolidated Statement of marks.
texts.text: Merit list  will  be  prepared  on  the  basis  of  total  marks  obtained  in  ITI  final  examinations  as reflected in Consolidated Statement of marks.

texts.label: page_footer
texts.orig: Page 3 of 18
texts.text: Page 3 of 18

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: M. Counselling will be done through online. Prior to online counselling candidates have to feed their choices of Branch and Institute in the portal. After that, online portal will automatically allot  a  seat  to  respective  candidate  and  an  allotment  letter  will  be  generated  which  will  be available in the portal for download and print. Students from any ITI trade will be allowed to take admission in corresponding Diploma Engineering Programme only as stated in Table-1 above.
texts.text: Counselling will be done through online. Prior to online counselling candidates have to feed their choices of Branch and Institute in the portal. After that, online portal will automatically allot  a  seat  to  respective  candidate  and  an  allotment  letter  will  be  generated  which  will  be available in the portal for download and print. Students from any ITI trade will be allowed to take admission in corresponding Diploma Engineering Programme only as stated in Table-1 above.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: N. Reservation of seats will be as per norms set by Govt. of Tripura.
texts.text: Reservation of seats will be as per norms set by Govt. of Tripura.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: O. Candidate must be physically present for producing all original documents at the time of taking admission in respective polytechnics. Candidates also have to fulfil all formalities of respective Institutes.
texts.text: Candidate must be physically present for producing all original documents at the time of taking admission in respective polytechnics. Candidates also have to fulfil all formalities of respective Institutes.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: P. After completion of 1 st round of counselling, there may be 2 nd round and Spot counselling if required based on availability of seats, which will be done within the permitted time-frame of admission process as per AICTE directives.
texts.text: After completion of 1 st round of counselling, there may be 2 nd round and Spot counselling if required based on availability of seats, which will be done within the permitted time-frame of admission process as per AICTE directives.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Q. During Online Application, candidate has to upload current colour Photograph, full Signature and other documents, otherwise candidate will lose his/her candidature/claim of admission for the year. Detail list of documents are available in the prospectus.
texts.text: During Online Application, candidate has to upload current colour Photograph, full Signature and other documents, otherwise candidate will lose his/her candidature/claim of admission for the year. Detail list of documents are available in the prospectus.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: R. First round document verification will be done before publication of merit list. If documents of any  candidate  are  found  inappropriate/incorrect,  in  that  case  candidate  will  lose  his/her candidature.
texts.text: First round document verification will be done before publication of merit list. If documents of any  candidate  are  found  inappropriate/incorrect,  in  that  case  candidate  will  lose  his/her candidature.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: S. BPL  candidates  seeking  relaxation  of  fees  must  provide  their  unique  Ration  Card  Number during  online  application  process.  After  verification,  if  the  claim  of  any  candidate  as  'BPL category' is found false/fake, then that candidate must pay full fees of Rs. 350/-, failing which, candidate will lose his / her candidature /claim of admission for the year.
texts.text: BPL  candidates  seeking  relaxation  of  fees  must  provide  their  unique  Ration  Card  Number during  online  application  process.  After  verification,  if  the  claim  of  any  candidate  as  'BPL category' is found false/fake, then that candidate must pay full fees of Rs. 350/-, failing which, candidate will lose his / her candidature /claim of admission for the year.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: T. Candidates must produce hard copy of their 'online application Acknowledgement page' and photocopy  of all relevant documents  along  with original  documents  during  document verification  and  admission.  Without  verification  of  original  documents,  no  candidate  will  be allowed to take admission. If documents of any candidate are found inappropriate/incorrect, in that case candidate will lose his/her candidature for taking admission.
texts.text: Candidates must produce hard copy of their 'online application Acknowledgement page' and photocopy  of all relevant documents  along  with original  documents  during  document verification  and  admission.  Without  verification  of  original  documents,  no  candidate  will  be allowed to take admission. If documents of any candidate are found inappropriate/incorrect, in that case candidate will lose his/her candidature for taking admission.

texts.text: Name of Institute with branch available

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Reservation of Seats:
texts.text: Reservation of Seats:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Reservation  of  seats  for  SC  /  ST  /  Person  with  Disability  (PwD)/  Wards  of  Ex-serviceman  (ESM) candidates  shall  be  as  per  the  Reservation  Policy  of  the  Government  of  Tripura.  In  case  of  PwD candidates, the percentage of disability and type of disability will be as per Government norms. The Certificate  (s)  issued  by  the  appropriate  authority  (Dept.  of  Sainik  Welfare  for  ESM  and  Dept.  of Social  Welfare  for  PwD  candidates)  shall  have  to  be  produced  in  original  at  the  time  of  document verification.
texts.text: Reservation  of  seats  for  SC  /  ST  /  Person  with  Disability  (PwD)/  Wards  of  Ex-serviceman  (ESM) candidates  shall  be  as  per  the  Reservation  Policy  of  the  Government  of  Tripura.  In  case  of  PwD candidates, the percentage of disability and type of disability will be as per Government norms. The Certificate  (s)  issued  by  the  appropriate  authority  (Dept.  of  Sainik  Welfare  for  ESM  and  Dept.  of Social  Welfare  for  PwD  candidates)  shall  have  to  be  produced  in  original  at  the  time  of  document verification.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In case of Wards of Ex-Serviceman (ESM) , a candidate should get his/her Online Acknowledgement  Page endorsed  from  Dept.  of  Sainik  Welfare  and  the  candidate  must  fulfill  all other conditions set by CSC - 2021. Such candidates mandatorily have to produce the duly endorsed Acknowledgement Page at the time of document verification.
texts.text: In case of Wards of Ex-Serviceman (ESM) , a candidate should get his/her Online Acknowledgement  Page endorsed  from  Dept.  of  Sainik  Welfare  and  the  candidate  must  fulfill  all other conditions set by CSC - 2021. Such candidates mandatorily have to produce the duly endorsed Acknowledgement Page at the time of document verification.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: However, if any amendment /change is/ are made after issue of this Notification, the same shall be notified in local newspaper and also in official website.
texts.text: However, if any amendment /change is/ are made after issue of this Notification, the same shall be notified in local newspaper and also in official website.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Submission of Online Application:
texts.text: Submission of Online Application:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The candidates must apply through the link provided in the websitewww.highereducation.tripura.gov.in or  directly  through deeet.tripura.gov.in .  The  candidates  are not  required  to  submit  the  hard  copy  of  their  online  application  confirmation  page  or  any  other document to Central Selection Committee (CSC) if not otherwise asked. Acknowledgement Page will not  be  generated  if  payment  is  not  deposited  within  the  stipulated  last  date  of  submission  of  online application form and thus his/her candidature will stand cancelled without further notification.
texts.text: The candidates must apply through the link provided in the websitewww.highereducation.tripura.gov.in or  directly  through deeet.tripura.gov.in .  The  candidates  are not  required  to  submit  the  hard  copy  of  their  online  application  confirmation  page  or  any  other document to Central Selection Committee (CSC) if not otherwise asked. Acknowledgement Page will not  be  generated  if  payment  is  not  deposited  within  the  stipulated  last  date  of  submission  of  online application form and thus his/her candidature will stand cancelled without further notification.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Application Fees:
texts.text: Application Fees:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Application fee with payment gateway service charges, as applicable, are payable by the candidates through Net banking/ Debit Card/ Credit Card only.
texts.text: Application fee with payment gateway service charges, as applicable, are payable by the candidates through Net banking/ Debit Card/ Credit Card only.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Instruction for Online Application:
texts.text: Instruction for Online Application:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The candidates are required to go through the instructions carefully before submitting online application.
texts.text: The candidates are required to go through the instructions carefully before submitting online application.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Once an application is received, it will be considered that the candidate agrees to all terms &  conditions,  rules  &  regulations  stipulated  in  the  Information  Bulletin  and  notices published by Central Selection Committee (CSC).
texts.text: Once an application is received, it will be considered that the candidate agrees to all terms &  conditions,  rules  &  regulations  stipulated  in  the  Information  Bulletin  and  notices published by Central Selection Committee (CSC).

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Any application not in compliance with the conditions specified by the CSC 2021 is liable to be rejected.
texts.text: Any application not in compliance with the conditions specified by the CSC 2021 is liable to be rejected.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. Candidates  have  to  apply  ' Online '  ONLY.  The  Application  Form  other  than online mode will not be accepted.
texts.text: Candidates  have  to  apply  ' Online '  ONLY.  The  Application  Form  other  than online mode will not be accepted.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. Submission  of  Online  Application  Form  should  be  done  by  accessing  Diploma
texts.text: Submission  of  Online  Application  Form  should  be  done  by  accessing  Diploma

texts.orig: Engineering  Entrance  Examination  of  Tripura  website https://deeet.tripura.gov.in/ . The Link is also provided in the DHE website: www.highereducation.tripura.gov.in. Only  one  application  is  to  be  submitted  by  a  candidate.  Duplicate  applications  may cause rejection of his/her candidature.
texts.text: Engineering  Entrance  Examination  of  Tripura  website https://deeet.tripura.gov.in/ . The Link is also provided in the DHE website: www.highereducation.tripura.gov.in. Only  one  application  is  to  be  submitted  by  a  candidate.  Duplicate  applications  may cause rejection of his/her candidature.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3. The eligibility  as  per  the  criteria  laid  down  for  Lateral  Entry  Admission  Scheme must be ensured beforehand.
texts.text: The eligibility  as  per  the  criteria  laid  down  for  Lateral  Entry  Admission  Scheme must be ensured beforehand.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4. It  is  essential  to  have  a  mobile  number  and  a  personal  email  ID  for  online application.
texts.text: It  is  essential  to  have  a  mobile  number  and  a  personal  email  ID  for  online application.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All future communications will be sent through the registered mobile number and email ID. CSC will not be responsible for non-receipt of any communication by the candidates if the mobile number and/or the email ID are wrong/non-existing/changed/ de-activated.
texts.text: All future communications will be sent through the registered mobile number and email ID. CSC will not be responsible for non-receipt of any communication by the candidates if the mobile number and/or the email ID are wrong/non-existing/changed/ de-activated.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Instructions for Filling Online Application Form (Detailed guidelines for complete online application for Lateral Entry Scheme - 2021):
texts.text: Instructions for Filling Online Application Form (Detailed guidelines for complete online application for Lateral Entry Scheme - 2021):

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: a) Registration:
texts.text: a) Registration:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: After accessing the DEEET Portal, the candidates have to Register themselves before applying.  A  candidate  has  to  carefully  note  down  his/her Registration  ID and Password etc. Once the registration details i.e. name, gender, date of birth and E-mail ID are entered and submitted, they cannot be changed /modified /edited under normal circumstances. Also the information must match exactly with the school admit cards, mark sheets,  certificates,  photo  identity  cards,  caste/category  certificates  etc.  which  a candidate has to produce at the time of reporting during admission.
texts.text: After accessing the DEEET Portal, the candidates have to Register themselves before applying.  A  candidate  has  to  carefully  note  down  his/her Registration  ID and Password etc. Once the registration details i.e. name, gender, date of birth and E-mail ID are entered and submitted, they cannot be changed /modified /edited under normal circumstances. Also the information must match exactly with the school admit cards, mark sheets,  certificates,  photo  identity  cards,  caste/category  certificates  etc.  which  a candidate has to produce at the time of reporting during admission.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: b) Creating Profile Details and Editing:
texts.text: b) Creating Profile Details and Editing:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  The candidates have to fill up their profile details in this section i.e. Father's name, Mother name's, Caste etc.
texts.text:  The candidates have to fill up their profile details in this section i.e. Father's name, Mother name's, Caste etc.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Scanned Images of Candidate's Photograph (Not more than 250 kb), Candidate's Signature (not more than100 kb) should be uploaded in JPEG / JPG format.
texts.text:  Scanned Images of Candidate's Photograph (Not more than 250 kb), Candidate's Signature (not more than100 kb) should be uploaded in JPEG / JPG format.

texts.text: c) Filling up Online Application:

texts.orig: Application form in online mode and noting down the system generated Application Number must be done.

texts.text: PRTC (not Citizenship certificate) as proof of residency of the applicant .

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: g) Making Payment:
texts.text: g) Making Payment:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The  payment  of  requisite  fees  using  online  payment  gateways  should  be  done and keeping proof of the payment is a must. The fee may be paid either by credit/debit card  or  Net  Banking. No  other  modes  like  Money  Order,  DD,  IPO  etc.  will  be accepted.  No  request  for  refund  of  fees  once  remitted  by  the  candidate  will  be entertained.
texts.text: The  payment  of  requisite  fees  using  online  payment  gateways  should  be  done and keeping proof of the payment is a must. The fee may be paid either by credit/debit card  or  Net  Banking. No  other  modes  like  Money  Order,  DD,  IPO  etc.  will  be accepted.  No  request  for  refund  of  fees  once  remitted  by  the  candidate  will  be entertained.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: h) Printing Acknowledgement:
texts.text: h) Printing Acknowledgement:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Candidates  need  to  take  a  Print  copy  of  the Acknowledgement  Page after  successful completion of the application. This Acknowledgement page should be submitted at the time of reporting and admission in the Institutes.
texts.text: Candidates  need  to  take  a  Print  copy  of  the Acknowledgement  Page after  successful completion of the application. This Acknowledgement page should be submitted at the time of reporting and admission in the Institutes.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Publication of Merit List & Online Counselling:
texts.text: Publication of Merit List & Online Counselling:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Merit list  will  be  prepared  on  the  basis  of  total  marks  obtained  in  ITI  final  examinations  as reflected in Consolidated Statement of marks. Merit List will be published in the www.highereducation.tripura.gov.in and deeet.tripura.gov.in portal.  Subsequently,  the concerned candidates mandatorily have to make  online choice feeding before online counselling. Only after that, there will be issue of online Seat Allotment Letter .
texts.text: Merit list  will  be  prepared  on  the  basis  of  total  marks  obtained  in  ITI  final  examinations  as reflected in Consolidated Statement of marks. Merit List will be published in the www.highereducation.tripura.gov.in and deeet.tripura.gov.in portal.  Subsequently,  the concerned candidates mandatorily have to make  online choice feeding before online counselling. Only after that, there will be issue of online Seat Allotment Letter .

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Online Counseling:
texts.text: Online Counseling:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Before online counselling, choice feeding has to be done in the online portal by the concerned candidates.  Based  on  the  choice  feeding,  the  eligible  candidates  will  be  nominated  for admission  in  different  Polytechnic  Institute  through  online  counseling.  Available  seats  of different  courses  in  different  Polytechnic  Institute  in  state  of  Tripura  will  be  distributed amongst the eligible candidates through online counseling.
texts.text: Before online counselling, choice feeding has to be done in the online portal by the concerned candidates.  Based  on  the  choice  feeding,  the  eligible  candidates  will  be  nominated  for admission  in  different  Polytechnic  Institute  through  online  counseling.  Available  seats  of different  courses  in  different  Polytechnic  Institute  in  state  of  Tripura  will  be  distributed amongst the eligible candidates through online counseling.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: The Following documents in Original along with two sets of photocopies are required at the time of document verification and Admission:
texts.text: The Following documents in Original along with two sets of photocopies are required at the time of document verification and Admission:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 1. Two recent passport size colour photographs .
texts.text: 1. Two recent passport size colour photographs .

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. Marksheet of Madhyamik or equivalent examination.
texts.text: Marksheet of Madhyamik or equivalent examination.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3. ITI final consolidated marksheet.
texts.text: ITI final consolidated marksheet.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4. ITI pass certificate.
texts.text: ITI pass certificate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5. Admit card of Madhyamik Examination or equivalent/ Birth certificate as proof of age.
texts.text: Admit card of Madhyamik Examination or equivalent/ Birth certificate as proof of age.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 6. PRTC (not Citizenship certificate) as proof of permanent residence of the applicant .
texts.text: PRTC (not Citizenship certificate) as proof of permanent residence of the applicant .

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 7. Caste ( SC/ST ) C ertificate of the candidate from the appropriate authority.
texts.text: Caste ( SC/ST ) C ertificate of the candidate from the appropriate authority.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 8. Persons with Disabilities ( PwD )  Certificate  issued  by  Dept.  of  Social  Welfare  /  District
texts.text: Persons with Disabilities ( PwD )  Certificate  issued  by  Dept.  of  Social  Welfare  /  District

texts.label: page_footer
texts.orig: Page 8 of 18
texts.text: Page 8 of 18

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Disabilities Rehabilitation Centres (DDRC) or competent authority approved by the State Government, if any.
texts.text: Disabilities Rehabilitation Centres (DDRC) or competent authority approved by the State Government, if any.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 9. Ward of  Ex  -  Serviceman  (ESM) Certificate  (from  Rajya  Sainik  Board/Directorate  of Sainik Welfare).
texts.text: Ward of  Ex  -  Serviceman  (ESM) Certificate  (from  Rajya  Sainik  Board/Directorate  of Sainik Welfare).

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 10. BPL Ration Card from the appropriate authority approved by the State Government, if any.
texts.text: BPL Ration Card from the appropriate authority approved by the State Government, if any.

texts.label: caption
texts.orig: Step 1: Go to https://highereducation.tripura.gov.in/ and click on 'For Admission into Diploma Engineering' for DEEET 2021 Registration in deeet.tripura.gov.in/
texts.text: Step 1: Go to https://highereducation.tripura.gov.in/ and click on 'For Admission into Diploma Engineering' for DEEET 2021 Registration in deeet.tripura.gov.in/

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. Enter  the  Mobile  Number  and  Click  on Generate OTP button.
texts.text: Enter  the  Mobile  Number  and  Click  on Generate OTP button.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. Enter  the  OTP  received  at  the  given mobile  number  in  OTP  field  and  click  on Submit OTP button.
texts.text: Enter  the  OTP  received  at  the  given mobile  number  in  OTP  field  and  click  on Submit OTP button.

texts.label: caption
texts.orig: Step 2: Registration in deeet.tripura.gov.in/
texts.text: Step 2: Registration in deeet.tripura.gov.in/

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For new registration, fill up the registration form with correct information of the candidate. It is essential to have a mobile number and a personal email ID
texts.text: For new registration, fill up the registration form with correct information of the candidate. It is essential to have a mobile number and a personal email ID

texts.label: text

texts.text: Click on 'For Admission into Diploma Engineering' for ITI Lateral 2021 Registration in deeet.tripura.gov.in/
